'''Tulak Hord's mask''' was a [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifact]] that belonged to the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Tulak Hord]]. Gold-[[Color/Legends|colored]], the mask consisted of two pieces on either side of the wearer's face that ran from the ear to the chin, and it allowed those who were steeped in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] to move in secrecy.<ref name="KOTOR" /> The mask was discovered by the former Sith Lord [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]<ref name="Codex" /> between [[3960 BBY|3960]]–[[3959 BBY]]<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> when he pillaged the [[tomb of Tulak Hord]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].<ref name="Codex" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tulak Hord's mask first appeared as an item in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'',<ref name="KOTOR" /> and it received a mention in the Codex entry for "Legacy of Tulak Hord" in the [[2011]] game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.<ref name="Codex" />
